hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet and transaction data into a unified workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports operational decisions for destination of funds reviews.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Destination of funds records lack auditability
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to create complete, traceable audit trails for destination of funds reviews due to fragmented provider outputs and disconnected transaction data. This leads to manual evidence gathering, slower investigations, and difficulty defending compliance decisions during audits or regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction data, provider outputs and review actions into one audit-ready evidence trail for destination of funds compliance and investigative workflows.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to destination of funds review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, routes alerts through case reviews, and preserves evidence to produce audit-ready destination of funds records.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT wallet and transaction data into structured cases with decision logs and audit evidence for clear destination of funds compliance and operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for destination of funds review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures destination of funds data, connecting wallet risk, transaction monitoring, and provider outputs into a connected compliance workflow for improved review and decision-making.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage destination of funds cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts and risk signals into case workflows that link customers, wallets, and transactions for consistent destination of funds review and escalation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, evidence packages and case history to support audit readiness and regulatory review for destination of funds determinations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing providers?
faq_4_answer: SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT and analytics providers, connecting their outputs into a controlled compliance stack without disrupting current integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace destination of funds providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured destination of funds workflows, evidence and reporting.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready destination of funds records
final_description: Review how SFTY connects on-chain data and KYT alerts into structured, evidence-grade workflows for destination of funds compliance.
